targets.provisional_gate: V3-EXQ-543j cross-machine confirmation (queued, byte-identical, ree-cloud-4, priority 5). branch-e CONFIRMS -> ARC-062 weak-reading demotion + ARC-063/V4 escalation may proceed; branch-a CONTRADICTS -> 543i was a single-machine basin artifact, do NOT demote, escalate to >=2-machine matrix; branch-c -> drift non_contributory.
targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note_ARC_06: V3-EXQ-543i (full run 20260518T191052Z, Branch e) confirmed: the MECH-333 use_differential_heads structural non-equilibrium does NOT escape the MECH-309 monomodal-collapse equilibrium under full outcome-coupled REINFORCE (all 4 diff-ON gated arms 3/3 inert; diff-OFF reproduced the 543g collapse -> valid single-variable test). The companion 20260518T063711Z run was a truncated ~690 s artifact (Branch c, non_contributory); its diff-OFF non-reproduction is explained by truncated training, not a substrate signal (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-543i_2026-05-19). Diagnosis: substrate_ceiling / missing-dependency (no per-context differentiation signal; GAP-C/GAP-D routing never wired live), NOT architectural falsification -- biology supports the rule-gating class. learning_extracted: use_differential_heads (MECH-333) structural non-equilibrium does NOT escape MECH-309 monomodal collapse under full outcome-coupled REINFORCE.
Diagnosis is missing-dependency / symbol-not-function, NOT architectural falsification of ARC-062 and NOT biology-divergence.
Single-machine Branch-e is PROVISIONAL by pre-registration + governance rule; the 543g->h->i chain exists because of cross-machine bistability.
GAP-C/GAP-D (discriminator->LateralPFC routing + trainable rule-bias head) is the unwired dependency the structural fix tried and failed to bypass.

cluster_pattern.shape: negative-control / sanity baseline reproduces (543g collapse) but every discrimination criterion fails (all gated arms 3/3 inert) -- the substrate-ceiling fingerprint, now extended: a structural non-equilibrium fix (MECH-333) also fails to escape it
cluster_pattern.structural_property: The V3 gated-heads + sigmoid-discriminator substrate trained by byte-identical shared-return outcome-coupled REINFORCE has the wiring ARC-062 asserts but no training signal that maintains context-routed head differentiation; collapse to a single mode is the equilibrium MECH-309 predicts, and it survives a forced structural non-equilibrium.
